name: Nixie Avatar State Assets
source: Codex-generated Nixie state renders converted from chroma-key to transparent PNG assets
notes: These are transparent state exports generated for the Nixie avatar state system.
The React controller can replace any PNG with a Lottie JSON, MP4, WebM, SVG, WebP, or AVIF later without changing state names.
The source renders used flat magenta chroma-key backgrounds, then were converted locally into transparent PNG files.
